form.formComment: Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.3 len at Murray Bridge Cl2 March 7 over 1400m defeating Vaniteux with 58kg at $2.90. The race before that second last of 9 at Morphettville Parks Cl2 on February 28 over 1250m, slow going 12 len behind Acappella Moon with 58.5kg at $4.80. One of the chief contenders.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Comes off a 39 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.3 len at Murray Bridge Cl2 March 7 over 1400m defeating Vaniteux with 58kg at $2.90. The race before that second last of 9 at Morphettville Parks Cl2 on February 28 over 1250m, slow going 12 len behind Acappella Moon with 58.5kg at $4.80. One of the chief contenders.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1000m, when racing keenly, steadied to avoid the heels of Vaniteux.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 14 months second last of 11 at Morphettville 0-66 on March 28 over 1522m, 16 len behind Scandalize carrying 59kg at $101. Previously second-up 3rd of 14 at Halidon Hdon Cup Bm70 on September 15 2024 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Bit Of A Rebel with 56.5kg at $26. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Second-up. First-up after 14 months second last of 11 at Morphettville 0-66 on March 28 over 1522m, 16 len behind Scandalize carrying 59kg at $101. Previously second-up 3rd of 14 at Halidon Hdon Cup Bm70 on September 15 2024 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Bit Of A Rebel with 56.5kg at $26. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered on jumping away by Cullen Skink.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd of 7 at Penola Bm68 on April 5 over 1400m, neck behind Piwhane carrying 54kg at $6.50. Before that 5th of 10 at Naracoorte Bm68 on February 8 over 1200m, 5 len behind Cork Harbour carrying 55kg at $8. Looms as a genuine threat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Most recently 2nd of 7 at Penola Bm68 on April 5 over 1400m, neck behind Piwhane carrying 54kg at $6.50. Before that 5th of 10 at Naracoorte Bm68 on February 8 over 1200m, 5 len behind Cork Harbour carrying 55kg at $8. Looms as a genuine threat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted on jumping away and taken out on to Santastico.

form.formComment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at Morphettville Parks 0-62 on March 21 over 1550m, 4 len behind Bargain Boy carrying 59kg at $12. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Murray Bridge 0-62 on March 7 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Anahorish carrying 59kg at $7. Hard to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). At the latest run 10th of 12 at Morphettville Parks 0-62 on March 21 over 1550m, 4 len behind Bargain Boy carrying 59kg at $12. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Murray Bridge 0-62 on March 7 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Anahorish carrying 59kg at $7. Hard to beat this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure over the concluding stages of the event.
Raced wide without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 11 at Oakbank 0-56 on April 6 over 1100m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Utah Joe carrying 60kg at $16. The start before that second last of 12 at Morphettville Parks Bm62 on March 21 over 1000m, 7 len behind Omaha Dawn with 58kg at $61. Outclassed again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Most recently second last of 11 at Oakbank 0-56 on April 6 over 1100m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Utah Joe carrying 60kg at $16. The start before that second last of 12 at Morphettville Parks Bm62 on March 21 over 1000m, 7 len behind Omaha Dawn with 58kg at $61. Outclassed again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and lost ground as a result.
Slow to begin and into stride.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 7 at this track Cl1 on April 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Our Little Star carrying 56kg at $5. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Bordertown 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 14 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bolshoi Babe with 54.5kg at $21. In the mix on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 7 at this track Cl1 on April 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Our Little Star carrying 56kg at $5. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Bordertown 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 14 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bolshoi Babe with 54.5kg at $21. In the mix on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure over the concluding 200m of the event.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 9 at this track Cl2 on April 1 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Stokomo with 54kg at $26. The start before that 2nd of 8 at Streaky Bay Bm62 on March 21 over 1350m, 1.2 len behind Holder Maid carrying 55kg at $7. Out of form and impossible to recommend.
